x-enumeration-literals.name: Consent
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Permission or Agreement obtained from someone or something having authority or power

Permission for something to happen or agreement to do something.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Power Of Attorney
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A written authorization that transfers specific rights from a party to another party.

Document that transfers specific rights from a party to another party. ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: Direct Debit Mandate
x-enumeration-literals.description:
An agreement between a debtor and a creditor allowing the creditor to instruct the bank to debit the debtors account

Authorization in favour of the creditor given by the debtor to debit its own account. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Servicing Mandate
x-enumeration-literals.description: An agreement between the customer and a service provider to authorise the service provider to access Products and Services on behalf of the customer.
